subject: Fermi GBM trigger 470375959/151128166 is not a GRB
body:
E. Bissaldi (INFN Bari)
reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger
470375959/151128166 at 03:59:15.95 UT on 28 November 2015,
tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB.

This trigger is due to particle activity."
